use_cases: Display AI agent code changes in a terminal-style interface
Show code diffs during code review workflows in developer tools
Present code modifications with syntax highlighting for additions/deletions
Guide users through code changes in AI-powered IDE interfaces
Demonstrate code editing capabilities in SaaS developer platforms
ai_summary: A terminal-style animated code diff viewer component that displays AI agent code changes with syntax highlighting for additions and deletions. Features bullet points with descriptions alongside animated diff blocks, designed for developer tools and code review interfaces.
